texto: History shows that all protest movements rely on symbols - boycotts, strikes, sit-ins, flags, songs. Symbolic action on whatever scale - from the Montgomery Bus Boycott to wearing a simple wristband - is designed to disrupt our everyday complacency and force people to think.
explicacao: Citação de Hugh Evans sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “History shows that all protest movements rely on symbols - boycotts, strikes, sit-ins, flags, son…” articula reflexao, simple, action em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como action e people.
